From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Metal identification plate

Not to be confused with [Vehicle registration plate](/wiki/Vehicle_registration_plate "Vehicle registration plate").

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Question_book-new.svg) | This article **relies largely or entirely on a [single source](/wiki/Wikipedia:Articles_with_a_single_source "Wikipedia:Articles with a single source")**. Relevant discussion may be found on the [talk page](/wiki/Talk:Builder%27s_plate "Talk:Builder's plate"). Please help [improve this article](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Builder%27s_plate&action=edit) by [introducing citations to additional sources](/wiki/Help:Referencing_for_beginners "Help:Referencing for beginners"). *Find sources:* ["Builder's plate"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22Builder%27s+plate%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22Builder%27s+plate%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Builder%27s+plate%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Builder%27s+plate%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Builder%27s+plate%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Builder%27s+plate%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(April 2023)* |

A **builder's plate** is usually a [metal](/wiki/Metal "Metal") plate that is attached to railway [locomotives](/wiki/Locomotives "Locomotives") and [rolling stock](/wiki/Rolling_stock "Rolling stock"), [bogies](/wiki/Bogie "Bogie"), [construction equipment](/wiki/Construction_equipment "Construction equipment"), [trucks](/wiki/Truck "Truck"), [automobiles](/wiki/Automobile "Automobile"), large [household appliances](/wiki/Household_appliance "Household appliance"), [bridges](/wiki/Bridge "Bridge"), [ships](/wiki/Ship "Ship") and more.
It gives such information as the name of the [manufacturer](/wiki/Manufacturer "Manufacturer"), the place and country of manufacture, the [model number](/wiki/Model_number "Model number"), the [serial number](/wiki/Serial_number "Serial number"), as well as the date of manufacture or date of fabrication of the item or unit.
